title: Computer Systems Design Services

narrative.executive_view: This packet is limited to the frozen project-led systems-integrator archetype, not all 541512 firms. No target-company evidence was supplied to bound the economic primitives, so the packet is intentionally UNPROVEN.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No target recognized-revenue ledger, accounting presentation, or documented third-party pass-through reconciliation was available. Revenue and controllable value added therefore remain MISSING rather than being inferred from gross billings.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen source-free role taxonomy is preserved exactly. Its cash-cost and removability selections are explicitly bounded assumptions and do not claim observed target delivery economics.
narrative.implementation: No project-level implementation evidence specific to the selected target archetype was available. Realization and investment schedules remain MISSING, with no neutral ramp or investment amount imputed.
narrative.commercial_capture: No evidence separates repeat projects, support, resale margin, backlog conversion, and competitive repricing for a target. Commercial-retention inputs remain MISSING.
narrative.buyability: No closed-deal population filtered to the specified archetype and EBITDA band was available. Sale availability, buyer access/win, and both capacity constraints remain separately MISSING.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No comparable multiple record can be bound to the required entry-equivalent normalized year-five state. Buy multiple, state, and downside multiple remain MISSING without a favorable-expansion assumption.
narrative.operator_survival: No reconciled fixed-base service basket or target operator-transition evidence was available. The required constant-price survival basket is MISSING and contains no invented services.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: Missing target evidence and the frozen ASSUMPTION value basis require UNPROVEN readiness. The source is classification context only and is not used to promote any economic endpoint.

scenario_narratives.low: No defensible low economic scenario is identified because score-driving primitives are missing.
scenario_narratives.base: No defensible base economic scenario is identified because score-driving primitives are missing.
scenario_narratives.high: No defensible high economic scenario is identified because score-driving primitives are missing.

sources.title: 2022 NAICS Definition: 541512 Computer Systems Design Services
sources.what_it_supports: Classification context for the frozen project-led systems-integrator archetype only; it does not supply target-specific economic primitives.

n_band.rationale: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $341,141 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541512); class <5: 37,887 firms, avg revenue/firm $394,508 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $61,740 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 4,632 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,847,390 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $289,117 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 2,780 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,880,864 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $607,355 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 2,795 firms, avg revenue/firm $11,906,109 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,863,306 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 729 firms, avg revenue/firm $51,131,923 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $8,002,146 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 429 firms, avg revenue/firm $404,366,175 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $63,283,306 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 3,524
caveats: Normalized dataset value lacks MED/HIGH support and is not promoted to DIRECT.

inclusion_criteria: Employer firm is classified in NAICS 541512 and falls within the derived $1-10M EBITDA target band.

Project-based planning, design, configuration, implementation, or integration of computer hardware, packaged software, networks, security systems, and communication technologies is the firm's largest revenue category.
The firm may also provide support, managed services, consulting, or product resale, but none of those categories exceeds project-based systems-integration revenue.
exclusion_criteria: Recurring contracted management or technical support is the largest revenue category.
Stand-alone advisory, staff augmentation, or technical consulting is the largest revenue category.
Software publishing, intellectual-property licensing, hardware or software resale, hosting, or infrastructure provisioning is the largest revenue category.
No largest revenue category can be established, including an exact tie between categories.
target_archetype.selection_basis: The four named archetypes assign hybrid firms by their single largest revenue category, making the options mutually exclusive; unresolved ties remain in the residual. Applied to the normalized 3,524-firm band, broader-channel leading-revenue shares give 1,551 project-led firms (44%) and 1,057 managed-services-led firms (30%). The difference is 494 firms, or 31.9% of the selected base, so there is no near tie on base counts. The project-led ranking is directionally corroborated by 2022 Census product revenue, where the enumerated design and integration lines total about $153.9B. Project-led is therefore the objective largest-base selection. The enumeration covers 3,348 firms at base, or 95.0% of the band, with the remaining 176 firms named as residual.

cva_reconciliation.controllable_value_added_boundary: R_cva equals recognized revenue minus documented third-party pass-through. For gross-presented hardware or software resale, deduct documented outside-provider acquisition cost once and retain the integrator's margin in R_cva. For net-presented resale, recognized margin is already value added and no second deduction is allowed. Every deducted amount is excluded symmetrically from employee cash cost, controllable-contractor cash cost, role pools, and G in the same scenario.

numerator_costs.accounting_basis: TTM employee cash cost within the frozen controllable-value-added boundary
TTM controlled contractor cash cost within the frozen controllable-value-added boundary

pass_through_reconciliation.rationale: No pass-through items or accounting reconciliation were supplied.

cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Access/win is separate from entry price and both remain missing.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The missing downside anchor binds the same missing state digest.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The closed P exclusion map excludes commercial retention and survival.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: The missing basket retains the required constant-price CVA assertions.
